'''gozhafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:biangulated|biangulated]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-zh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:biangulated|biangulated]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gozhafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gozhafithi|gozhafithi]] || [[word:gozhafiji|gozhafiji]] || [[word:gozhafishi|gozhafishi]] || [[word:gozhafiki|gozhafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gozhafuthuthu|gozhafuthuthu]] || [[word:gozhafujuju|gozhafujuju]] || [[word:gozhafushushu|gozhafushushu]] || [[word:gozhafukuku|gozhafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gozhafuthu|gozhafuthu]] || [[word:gozhafuju|gozhafuju]] || [[word:gozhafushu|gozhafushu]] || [[word:gozhafuku|gozhafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gozhafufthuf|gozhafufthuf]] || [[word:gozhafufjuf|gozhafufjuf]] || [[word:gozhafufshuf|gozhafufshuf]] || [[word:gozhafufkuf|gozhafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gozhafethe|gozhafethe]] || [[word:gozhafeje|gozhafeje]] || [[word:gozhafeshe|gozhafeshe]] || [[word:gozhafeke|gozhafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gozhafothotho|gozhafothotho]] || [[word:gozhafojojo|gozhafojojo]] || [[word:gozhafoshosho|gozhafoshosho]] || [[word:gozhafokoko|gozhafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gozhafotho|gozhafotho]] || [[word:gozhafojo|gozhafojo]] || [[word:gozhafosho|gozhafosho]] || [[word:gozhafoko|gozhafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gozhafofthof|gozhafofthof]] || [[word:gozhafofjof|gozhafofjof]] || [[word:gozhafofshof|gozhafofshof]] || [[word:gozhafofkof|gozhafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gozhafïfthïf|gozhafïfthïf]] || [[word:gozhafïfjïf|gozhafïfjïf]] || [[word:gozhafïfshïf|gozhafïfshïf]] || [[word:gozhafïfkïf|gozhafïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gozhafïfthïfthïf|gozhafïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:gozhafïfjïfjïf|gozhafïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:gozhafïfshïfshïf|gozhafïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:gozhafïfkïfkïf|gozhafïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gozhafïfthïf|gozhafïfthïf]] || [[word:gozhafïfjïf|gozhafïfjïf]] || [[word:gozhafïfshïf|gozhafïfshïf]] || [[word:gozhafïfkïf|gozhafïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gozhafïfthïf|gozhafïfthïf]] || [[word:gozhafïfjïf|gozhafïfjïf]] || [[word:gozhafïfshïf|gozhafïfshïf]] || [[word:gozhafïfkïf|gozhafïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gozhafæthæ|gozhafæthæ]] || [[word:gozhafæjæ|gozhafæjæ]] || [[word:gozhafæshæ|gozhafæshæ]] || [[word:gozhafækæ|gozhafækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gozhafathatha|gozhafathatha]] || [[word:gozhafajaja|gozhafajaja]] || [[word:gozhafashasha|gozhafashasha]] || [[word:gozhafakaka|gozhafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gozhafatha|gozhafatha]] || [[word:gozhafaja|gozhafaja]] || [[word:gozhafasha|gozhafasha]] || [[word:gozhafaka|gozhafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gozhafafthaf|gozhafafthaf]] || [[word:gozhafafjaf|gozhafafjaf]] || [[word:gozhafafshaf|gozhafafshaf]] || [[word:gozhafafkaf|gozhafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:gozhafasha|gozhafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:gozhafshësha|gozhafshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhafrosha|gozhafrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhafmusha|gozhafmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozhafyasha|gozhafyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogozhafnkshësha|gogozhafnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogozhafnkrosha|gogozhafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogozhafnkmusha|gogozhafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogozhafnkyasha|gogozhafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:gozhazhafasha|gozhazhafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gozhazhafshësha|gozhazhafshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhazhafrosha|gozhazhafrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhazhafmusha|gozhazhafmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozhazhafyasha|gozhazhafyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogozhazhafnkshësha|gogozhazhafnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogozhazhafnkrosha|gogozhazhafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogozhazhafnkmusha|gogozhazhafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogozhazhafnkyasha|gogozhazhafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:gezhæfasha|gezhæfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gezhæfshësha|gezhæfshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gezhæfrosha|gezhæfrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gezhæfmusha|gezhæfmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gezhæfyasha|gezhæfyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogezhæfnkshësha|gogezhæfnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogezhæfnkrosha|gogezhæfnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogezhæfnkmusha|gogezhæfnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogezhæfnkyasha|gogezhæfnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:gozhfafasha|gozhfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gozhfafshësha|gozhfafshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhfafrosha|gozhfafrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhfafmusha|gozhfafmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozhfafyasha|gozhfafyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogozhfafnkshësha|gogozhfafnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogozhfafnkrosha|gogozhfafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogozhfafnkmusha|gogozhfafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogozhfafnkyasha|gogozhfafnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
